Name: Trenton Craft
Description: A test subject for the USA's Super-Soldier Program during World War II, Trenton Craft received treatments that gave him vast telekinetic powers. Outfitted as Colonel America, Craft was first deployed to Yokohama, Japan in 1944; he lost control of his powers, devastating the island and its entire population.
